name: Control Panel Search Operators
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": These operators work in the search filters on the sales order, customer and product pages."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Operator\u00a0", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Definition\u00a0", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "&"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "& represents AND. & is the default separator in a search query. Enter an & symbol between words to do an AND query."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "John & Peter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ","}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Commas represent OR. Enter a comma between words to do an OR query."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "John, Peter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "()"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Parentheses are used to do complex queries."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "( a & b ) OR ( x & y ) OR z\u00a0"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\"\""}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quotes are used to search for a phrase."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\"a b c\""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "EXACT:\u00a0"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exact match search. Only returns results that exactly match the search term. Can also be substituted with ^"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "EXACT:ABC"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "            ^ABC"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LIKE:\u00a0"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Like match search. Returns results that contain the search term."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LIKE:ABC"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "STARTWITH:"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Returns results that start with the search term."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "STARTWITH:ABC"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ENDWITH:"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Returns results that end with the search term."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ENDWITH:ABC"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eom / som"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In date fields, eom and som can be used to represent the start of month or end of month."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eom"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ago"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In date fields, use "}, {"text": "x hour ago", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "x day ago", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "x month ago", "code": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "x year ago", "code": true}, {"text": " to represent a date from today."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3 year ago"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-98b05f32"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
